title: statice humilis
intro: Statice humilis, also known as low statice or creeping statice, is a flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is a low-growing, spreading perennial that produces small, delicate white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Statice humilis can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
